name: localai-vscode-chat
description: Forked version of the original project. Copilot-style AI chat and coding agent for the LocalAI server, with ongoing improvements.

commands.title: CVSU AI DEV: Chat with Selection
CVSU AI DEV: Switch Server / Local
CVSU AI DEV: Index Workspace for RAG
CVSU AI DEV: Show RAG Index Stats
CVSU AI DEV: Clear RAG Index
CVSU AI DEV: Set Up Custom Agents & Skills (.cvsuai)
CVSU AI DEV: Compact Chat (summarize older messages)
CVSU AI DEV: Edit Keyboard Shortcut

localai.baseUrl.description: Base URL of the LocalAI server. OpenAI-compatible routes live under <baseUrl>/v1.

localai.serverUrl.description: The default 'Server' URL when toggling the target.

localai.localUrl.description: The default 'Local' URL when toggling the target.

localai.model.description: The AI model to use for chat and completion.

localai.contextSize.description: The model's context window in tokens. Must match the server/model's loaded context_size. Default 4096; raise to 8192+ only if your model is loaded with a bigger window (the LOCAL instance is configured for 8192).

localai.contextTokenBudget.description: Max tokens of file/workspace context attached per message. Keep below the model's context window (localai.contextSize). Raise it if you increase the context window.

localai.maxTokens.description: Cap the model's reply length (max_tokens). Generation time scales with reply length, so a smaller cap = a faster reply. 0 means no cap (server decides). Try 512–1024 for snappier answers.

localai.autoCompact.description: When a conversation nears the model's context window, automatically summarize the older messages into a compact summary and continue — keeping context while freeing tokens. Disable to fall back to a simple warning.

localai.autopilot.description: If a reply is interrupted or stopped, automatically compact older history (when needed) and continue the response.

localai.warnNearContextLimit.description: If auto-compact is off: show a one-time heads-up when a conversation nears the model's context window (the chat stays open; oldest messages are trimmed from requests automatically).

localai.agent.maxIterations.description: Maximum tool-call steps the agent may take before stopping.

localai.autocomplete.enabled.description: Enable inline autocomplete (like Copilot). Triggers automatically as you type.

localai.agent.autoApproveWrites.description: If true, the agent writes files without asking for confirmation. Use with caution.

localai.rag.enabled.description: Enable codebase semantic search (RAG). Index with 'CVSU AI DEV: Index Workspace for RAG', then ask with /codebase.

localai.rag.topK.description: How many code chunks to retrieve and attach per /codebase question.

localai.rag.embeddingModel.description: Text-embedding model used by RAG indexing/retrieval. Use the extension Settings command to pick from installed embedding-capable models.

localai.openChatKeybinding.description: Keyboard shortcut to open the CVSU AI DEV chat. Edit with 'CVSU AI DEV: Edit Keyboard Shortcut' command or modify directly in keybindings.json (search for 'cvsuai.openChat').
